page: Microsoft Azure E128-64ads_v7 is a memory-optimized virtual machine belonging to the Eadsv7 server family. It is powered by an AMD EPYC 9V45 processor using the x86_64 architecture, featuring 32 physical cores and 64 dedicated vCPUs with hyper-threading enabled. The system is equipped with 1024.0 GB of system memory, providing 16.0 GB of RAM per core. For local storage, it includes a 7559 GB local disk and supports Premium Storage. The virtualization layer is managed by Microsoft Hyper-V.

Benchmark evaluations demonstrate strong performance across compute and memory subsystems. The single-core CPU performance via stress-ng is rated in the top tier at 3795.34, while multi-core performance reaches 118894.07. Memory bandwidth is robust, with read-only small block cached speeds at 6714.74 GB/sec and large block uncached write speeds at 133.04 GB/sec. PassMark database operations score in the top tier at 37846.03, and Redis SET operations achieve 101.98 million operations per second. Additionally, the processor supports advanced instruction sets including AVX-512 and cryptography acceleration, which contribute to top-tier scores in PassMark CPU extended instructions and single-threaded compression tasks.

With its high memory-to-vCPU ratio and substantial 7559 GB local storage capacity, this instance is designed for memory-intensive workloads. It is highly suitable for large-scale databases, in-memory caching systems, data analytics, and enterprise applications. The qualitative cost profile reflects a high-density resource allocation, offering a balanced tradeoff between massive memory capacity, dedicated compute resources, and high-capacity local storage without the overhead of dedicated GPU hardware.
description: Microsoft Azure E128-64ads_v7 is a memory-optimized virtual machine from the Eadsv7 family, powered by an AMD EPYC 9V45 processor. Utilizing the x86_64 architecture, it features 32 physical cores, 64 dedicated vCPUs, and 1024.0 GB of RAM, yielding a high memory-to-vCPU ratio. It includes a 7559 GB local storage disk and is Premium Storage capable under the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. Performance benchmarks place this server in the top tier for database operations, single-core CPU tasks, and memory performance, with Redis SET operations reaching 101.98 million operations per second. The hardware configuration is optimized for memory-intensive enterprise workloads, large relational databases, in-memory data stores, and data analytics pipelines that require substantial local storage and high memory capacity without GPU acceleration.
og_description: Microsoft Azure E128-64ads_v7 is a memory-optimized virtual machine featuring 64 vCPUs, 1024 GB RAM, and 7559 GB local storage, designed for high-performance database and memory-intensive workloads.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure E128-64ads_v7 is a memory-optimized VM with 64 vCPUs, 1024 GB RAM, and 7559 GB local storage for database workloads.
tagline: A high-capacity memory-optimized virtual machine featuring dedicated AMD EPYC processors and massive local storage for demanding database workloads.

1024.0 GB of system memory providing 16.0 GB of RAM per core
7559 GB of local storage with Premium Storage capability
Top-tier database operations and memory bandwidth performance
Optimized for large-scale databases, in-memory caching, and data analytics
